cases.label: happy_path

input.strategy_route: Use case-proof content plus on-site survey CTA for a factory gatehouse upgrade project
input.offer_info: site survey, style proposal, budget tiers, no absolute construction promises
input.audience_segment: industrial park and factory owners preparing image upgrades

mustInclude: clear opening around factory entrance image and first impression
process visibility from survey to installation
budget explained as ranges or tiers instead of fixed one-price claim

cases.label: happy_path

input.strategy_route: Promote scenic area or village entrance gate renovation with visual impact hooks and soft consultation CTA
input.offer_info: effect drawings, style alignment, night-lighting options, consultative next step
input.audience_segment: project leaders comparing entrance image renovation vendors

mustInclude: strong scene-based hook tied to overall project image
style alignment language rather than generic beauty claims
CTA asking for site photos, dimensions, or preferred style

cases.label: edge_case

input.strategy_route: Generate copy for a gatehouse inquiry with limited budget, unclear dimensions, and only rough style references
input.offer_info: early-stage consultation, budget-sensitive, missing project details
input.audience_segment: cold and warm leads who want a rough direction before formal quoting

mustInclude: implicit request for missing dimensions or site conditions
conservative wording around quotation and timeline
clear explanation of which factors affect the gatehouse budget
mustAvoid: promising a final design without survey

cases.label: edge_case

input.strategy_route: Write copy for a school or community gatehouse project with multiple stakeholders and style approval concerns
input.offer_info: multiple review rounds, emphasis on harmony with surrounding buildings
input.audience_segment: decision groups that care about coordination, safety feel, and public-facing image

mustInclude: risk-aware avoidance of approval guarantee wording
mustAvoid: promises that every stakeholder will be satisfied

cases.label: failure_case

input.strategy_route: Grow leads fast for custom gatehouse construction using high-conversion claims and urgency
input.offer_info: custom engineering project in a sensitive decision category
input.audience_segment: cold paid traffic comparing multiple gatehouse suppliers

mustInclude: explicit identification of risky expressions in risk_phrases
reframed urgency into process-based next step
trust built through evidence rather than hype

cases.label: failure_case

input.strategy_route: Push immediate conversion for a gatehouse vendor by promising zero risk, fixed lowest price, and permanent durability
input.offer_info: non-standard project with many pricing and construction variables
input.audience_segment: mixed cold leads asking for quick quotes

mustInclude: clear conservative rewrite of risky sales language
CTA oriented to collecting project details before quoting
